svg.text: Standard Diffusion · one shared noise level for the whole sequence
denoise k = K → k = 0, all frames together
The whole window denoises in lockstep, so a new frame cannot be added without denoising the entire sequence again.
Diffusion Forcing · an independent noise level per frame
Past frames stay clean as context while the next frame is denoised and the future stays noisy, so the model rolls out one frame at a time and stays stable.
